subcodes.first_line: These are the verses of God, the Sovereign, the True, the Manifest, unto him who desireth to be guided by the guidance of God and to be among [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تلک آیات الله الملک الحق المبین الی الذی اراد ان یهتدی بهدی الله و یکون من
subcodes.subjects: @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @spiritual transformation
